creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Rawstats doesn't look right. There is consistency to the problem.

Can you post the output of:

sysctl kern.timecounter
sysctl kern.eventtimer
sysctl kern.clockrate
sysctl hw.clockrate
sysctl kern.hz

After the system has been up for a day: date.

List all the contents of rc.conf.
